description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved trastuzumab emtansine as a single agent for reimbursement as a treatment option for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with HER2-positive early breast cancer who have residual invasive disease, in the breast and/or lymph nodes, after neoadjuvant taxane-based and HER2-targeted therapy.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

reportedIn.name: Trastuzumab Emtansine (Kadcyla) Early Breast Cancer Therapy - 21 days. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
